pi_items.source: Official Sygic documentation confirms default speed limit sound trigger thresholds are 5, 10, and 15 km over the limit (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/2/en/topic/speed-limits)
Speed limit and speed camera warnings are core features of Sygic GPS (https://www.sygic.com/what-is/speed-limits)
Sygic documentation consistently uses 'warn' and 'warning' terminology for notifications (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation-for-android/5/en/topic/upozornenia-a-zvuky)
Speed limit warnings are a core feature, accessed via Settings > Notifications > Speed Limits (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/speed-limits)

Sygic uses 'radar' terminology alongside 'speed camera' terminology in documentation and user interface. French documentation uses 'Radars' and 'Radars mobiles' (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/2/fr/topic/speed-cameras)
Speed cameras are a core feature of Sygic GPS, with Fixed Speed Cameras and Mobile Speed Cameras as distinct categories (https://www.sygic.com/what-is/speed-cameras)

Official Sygic documentation consistently refers to this menu as 'Notifications & Sounds' (Android) or 'Sounds and Notifications' (iOS). Menu path is: Menu > Settings > Notifications & Sounds (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation-for-android/5/en/topic/upozornenia-a-zvuky)
Confirmed by Google Play Store, AppBrain, and APKMirror (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.sygic.aura)
Official app name from Google Play Store is 'Sygic GPS Navigation & Maps' (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.sygic.aura)

privileged_info_summary: Sygic GPS Navigation (package: com.sygic.aura) is an Android GPS navigation application with offline maps. Speed limit warnings can be configured with tolerance values of 5, 10, or 15 km/h above the posted limit - the task specifies 10 km/h which is a valid configuration. Speed camera warnings for both fixed and mobile speed cameras are available features. The settings menu for these warnings is accessed via Settings > Notifications & Sounds (not 'Warnings and Notifications' as stated in metadata). Keywords 'speed', 'warn', 'limit', 'radar', and 'camera' all appear in relevant Sygic documentation and UI elements related to speed warning configuration.
